info.name: ACC ERP Backend API - Complete
info.description:
Complete API collection auto-generated from project routes/controllers.

Coverage includes: Auth, Customers, Categories, Suppliers, Products, Stock, Invoices, Payments, Returns, Sales Reports, Analytics Reports, Purchase Orders, and negative edge cases.

Authentication:
- Run Auth > Login to capture JWT token into collection variable authToken.
- Protected endpoints send Authorization: Bearer {{authToken}}.

Generated at: 2026-04-06T23:36:24.635Z

item.name: System
item.description: Operational endpoints for service availability checks.

request.description: Returns API liveness and uptime metadata.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication and user management. Login auto-saves JWT into authToken collection variable.

request.description: Creates first ADMIN user when database has no users.
Authenticates user and returns JWT token used by protected endpoints.
Returns authenticated user profile from JWT.
Creates employee or accountant user. Requires ADMIN role token.
Negative test for invalid username/password.
Negative test for missing/invalid token.

item.name: Customers
item.description: Customer CRUD, statements, and exports. All routes require Bearer JWT.

request.description: Returns paginated customers list. Supports filtering via query parameters.
Creates a new customer entity.
Finds one customer by name with related invoices, returns, payments, transactions.
Fetches a single customer by ObjectId.
Updates mutable customer fields.
Generates customer financial statement by customer name.
Downloads customer statement as spreadsheet. Body requires customer name.
Exports invoice report in PDF format. Implementation may accept date filter body on server side.
Exports invoice report in Excel format. Implementation may accept date filter body on server side.
Negative test for non-existing customer id.
Returns all categories with pagination/filter support.
Creates a category and optional hierarchy relation.
Updates category details.
Deletes category by id.
Returns suppliers list.
Creates a supplier record with contact and payment terms.
Fetches one supplier by id.
Updates supplier details.
Deletes supplier by id.

item.name: Products
item.description: Product catalog management with supplier/category validation.

request.description: Returns products with populated supplier and category.
Creates product by supplier/category names, validates pricing.
Returns one product with category and supplier details.
Updates product fields like selling price, taxes, and description.
Deletes product by id.

item.name: Stock
item.description: Inventory stock quantity and expiry tracking.

request.description: Returns stock records with populated product details.
Creates initial stock entry for product by name.
Fetches one stock record by id.
Updates stock quantity or batch metadata.
Deletes stock entry by id.

item.name: Invoices
item.description: Invoice lifecycle operations including create, update, status transition, and deletion.

request.description: Returns all invoices with pagination.
Creates invoice with customer info and product line items, updates stock and transactions.
Retrieves invoice details using invoice number.
Fetches single invoice by id.
Updates invoice data and recalculates totals as needed.
Transitions invoice status. For paid status, paymentAmount records payment.
Deletes invoice and related transactions.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Customer payment processing and payment history.

request.description: Returns payments list with customer/invoice references.
Creates payment for a customer with optional invoice number.
Fetches payment details by id.
Updates payment attributes such as amount, method, notes.
Deletes a payment and reverts related balances.

item.name: Returns
item.description: Sales return retrieval and management endpoints. Create return route is currently not exposed in router.

request.description: Returns all return records.
Fetches return record by id.
Updates mutable fields on return record.
Soft-deletes return and restores stock/customer balances according to business logic.

item.name: Sales Reports
item.description: Business report endpoints under /sales. These routes are mounted without protect middleware in app.js.

request.description: Builds financial report with revenue, refunds, net sales, and breakdowns.
Returns top products by quantity or revenue.
Returns customer purchasing and payment behavior analysis.
Aggregates sales by product category for selected period.
Returns high-level sales summary for selected date range.
Returns time-series revenue trend.
Returns top-selling products list.
Returns sales contribution by customer.
Returns per-sale profitability with pagination metadata.
Returns stock levels and inventory summary.
Returns stock movement history for optional product.
Returns products with low/no movement.
Returns products with highest usage in period.
Returns top customers by sales contribution.
Returns customer outstanding balances and summary.
Returns one customer statement by customer id and date range.
Returns supplier balances outstanding summary.
Returns one supplier statement by supplier id and date range.
Returns consolidated financial summary for selected period.

item.name: Purchase Orders
item.description: Purchase order creation, receiving, payment, cancellation, and stats.

request.description: Returns purchase orders list.
Creates purchase order from supplier name and item lines.
Returns purchase order KPIs and aggregates.
Fetches one purchase order by id.
Marks items as received and updates stock quantities.
Registers payment against purchase order payable.
Cancels a non-fully-received purchase order and reverts received stock where applicable.
Deletes purchase order record by id.

item.name: Edge Cases
item.description: Negative scenarios for invalid input, unauthorized access, and not found resources.

request.description: Attempts product creation with invalid negative pricing to validate input handling.
Verifies protected endpoint rejects invalid token.
Verifies not-found handling for unknown purchase order id.
